Mtn To Quash The Subpoena Of Medical Psychaiatrist
Off Calendar Sep-26-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Joel Seigel, Esq (415-777-5547) for Susan Steingraber Plaintiff and moving party
Peter Glaessner, Esq of AGHW (415-697-2000) for The Roman Catholic Archbishop of San Francisco, Defendant and opposing party.

Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PLAINTIFF SUSAN STEINGRABER's Motion To Quash The Subpoena Of Medical Psychaiatrist is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answr To Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE ROMAN CATHOLIC ARCHBISHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Complaint is granted. Given the great liberality in granting amendment to the pleadings, Defendant is granted leave to file its First Amended Answer to allege affirmative defenses of laches and trivial defect. Plaintiff has not sufficiently demonstrated any prejudice. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Set For Trial On Sep-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
